steps.title: Recognize 50% as one-half
steps.content: Fifty percent is the same as one-half: 50% = $\frac{1}{2}$. We need to find half of 340 seats.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: As a final check, compare the result from the work to the answer choices. The value, equation, or condition found above matches Choice C — 170, 170, and the other choices fail the same setup or substitution. Therefore C.
